data.name: My Girlfriend is a Musician
data.detailed_description:
關注焦點


關於此遊戲

“My Girlfriend is a Musician” is a Music Tour Management Simulator and Yuri Dating Simulator. Play as an aspiring junior tour manager helming a series of concerts around Europe for an eccentric yet extremely entertaining Rockstar!

Will the concert tour be successful?

Will the venture be profitable?

Will you keep your charismatic companions out of trouble?

Will you find love along the way?

Only you can find out by playing “My Girlfriend is a Musician”.

Featuring

- A fun and upbeat road trip comedy storyline
- Beautiful anime-style art
- Jazz, rock, and electronic music
- Business and money management simulation
- 50,000+ Word Count
- Multiple endings and love interests

data.short_description: “My Girlfriend is a Musician” is a Music Tour Management Simulator and Yuri Dating Simulator. Play as an aspiring junior tour manager helming a series of concerts around Europe for an eccentric yet extremely entertaining Rockstar!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows Vista / 7 / 8 / 10
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6 - 10.13
  • 處理器: 1.5GHz Intel Core 2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
